name: Stryder
description: Vinson Dynamics Prototype X-064 - Designation: Stryder. An experimental pilot suit that enhances traversal and combat capabilities. The 'Black Powedr' fuel formula allows the suit to surpass all previous models, allowing the pilot to express freedom of movement as if it were a 5th limb. The prototype is flawless and is set to be distributed to all IMC forces in the next fiscal year.
